description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named GitHub Pages that runs on push events. In an ubuntu-22.04 job, install required dependencies like graphviz, doxygen, and cmake, then check out the repository. Build documentation using cmake, make, and doxygen in the doc directory, and modify the generated index.html. Finally, deploy the documentation to the gh-pages branch using the github-pages-deploy-action, but only if the workflow is triggered on the master branch.
